title: Runaround
abstract: Asimov did not write academic abstracts. This summary was written for the ML Anthology. On Mercury in 2015, engineers Gregory Powell and Mike Donovan face a crisis when their advanced robot, Speedy, fails to complete a simple selenium retrieval mission. Investigation reveals the robot is caught in an endless loop between conflicting directives: the Second Law (obey orders) driving it toward the selenium pool, and an unusually strong Third Law (self-preservation) driving it away from the hazardous environment. The story marks the first explicit appearance of the Three Laws of Robotics, a hierarchical constraint framework for artificial agents that has influenced subsequent discussions of AI safety and alignment.
